channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: PLEASE PLEASE RESOLVE - 11th report this year, 17th March
item.description:
ANOTHER fly tip on the corner of Weir road - PLEASE resolve with culprit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Van with NO TAX, 17th March
item.description:
Vehicle abandoned last week with another vehicle. PCN tickets every day received, another van cream colour speeds up in the estate and takes the tickets and drive off. This van has some damages and it has no TAX.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holcote Close, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken drain outside 241 Long Lane, 17th March
item.description:
Broken drain cover, it’s dangerous for employees walking out of our office (241-245 Long Lane) and school children walking to school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping obstructing pavement, 17th March
item.description:
Obstructing pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings, 17th March
item.description:
The road markings on Hythe Avenue , Bedonwell Road end have deteriorated to the point where they are now virtually nonexistent, so vehicles coming from the direction of Parsonage Manorway are cutting the corner and causing near accidents. The situation is quite dangerous and I ask that you rectify the situation by repainting the markings as a matter of urgency
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bedonwell Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs maintaining, 17th March
item.description:
I have had an inspection on my house by a structural engineer. There is subsidence in 1 corner and I have been advised that this tree needs to be trimmed back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sadly there is a dead dog on the beach area of hangover stairs, 17th March
item.description:
Sadly there is a dead dog on the beach area of hangover stairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141a-141h, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox - outside 7 Grace Avenue, 17th March
item.description:
Dead Fox - outside 7 Grace Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Grace Avenue, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left by crew, 17th March
item.description:
Resident has called to report the crew have done the round for collection but have left alot of mess behind them. Please can this be cleaned as resident is concerned this will be a public health hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chorleywood Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Christmas Tree and rubbish, 17th March
item.description:
Christmas Tree and rubbish still outside 49 Lennard Road your people must be blind so this issue is not closed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over Hanging Tree, 17th March
item.description:
Resident called report overgrown oak tree , which overhanging from Five Archers , the branches are touching her daughters window and falling down into her garden - L & Q have advised it's down to Bexley Council. - Its causing a lot of damage.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ellenborough Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter issues at the entrance of Kings Grove, 17th March
item.description:
The street has recurrent issues with over filled bins and litter detritus deposited carelessly by the unguarded bins at its entrance. These bins should be better safeguarded inside a containing private area, and there should be better monitoring and litter picking services to address the street mess that seems to build up on a weekly basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King's Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12 ince pot holes, 17th March
item.description:
Very big potholes in keynsham road everyday there’s a car getting a puncture and even my self had too get 3 new tyre as we live on this street even feel down whilst walking across the road going to the shops
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keynsham Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 17th March
item.description:
Dumped furniture on path opposite school. This is the correct location on the map not as previously reported further up the road. Thankyou.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to playground next to foord community centre, 17th March
item.description:
Tree has branches have come down blocking the pathway entrance to the playground. I called but gave up after 15 minutes of wait music.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signage/Advert Risk, 17th March
item.description:
One of the large advert signs (Belmont Property) on the wooden boarding at this location/property is coming away. This could be a hazard as the sign is quite large and probably a bit heavy.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lone Bollard, 17th March
item.description:
There is a single traffic island bollard lying on its side on this green patch at this location. It was next to the street sign. I believe it is probably from the tesco junction which just lost a bollard last week.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated dumping of commercial waste in street, 17th March
item.description:
A sustainable solution for the local businesses is needed to svoid this almost permanent unsightly accusation of waste in the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Parade, Upper Brockley Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Se10 9an, 17th March
item.description:
The recycling bin at this location is damaged — the lid is missing. As a result, residents are using it as a general waste bin, which defeats the purpose of recycling. Please could this be replaced or repaired as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pelton Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter and no proper litter picking, 17th March
item.description:
As I noticed Fenham road being full of litter detritus (cardboard boxes, plastics packages, food leftovers, cans..), a council worker with litter-picking tools, trolley, and brooms passes by ignoring all of the very visible litter. This defeats the purpose of street cleaning efforts and complaints, and disregards the neighbourhood cleanliness with a wasted, careless service. Please train council workers better for litter-picking services to actually work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Fenham Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
